spec.name: At The Base Of The Pyramid
spec.description: The mighty pyramid towers above you out of the hot desert sands, made from huge blocks of stone that have been coated over with a rough sandy plaster-like substance. The face of the pyramid is steep, but you think you might be able to climb it.

south.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

up.description: The steep slope of the pyramid rises up before you.

extra_descs.description: You wonder how anyone could have built such a massive thing out in this heat.
